channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Do Not Sell F-35s to Turkey
item.description: Such a sale would unnecessarily threaten American security and military personnel.

item.title: Congress Could Unintentionally Help China Win the AI Race
item.description: Overly strict export controls might prevent American companies from serving global customers.

item.title: The Endless Alarm Over Liberalism
item.description: Right- and left-wing theorists have exaggerated policy disagreements into national crises.

item.title: Michigan Senate Debate: Stevens and El-Sayed Clash Over Corporate Money and Billionaire Influence
item.description: The Democratic primary debate between Haley Stevens and Abdul El-Sayed began with a question on inflation, but quickly turned to corporate donations.
